caption: A group of students is gathered in a classroom with brick walls and a large blackboard covered in chalk writing. The students, mostly young boys and girls, are dressed in casual clothing, including t-shirts and sweaters. Several students sit at long wooden desks, while others stand. In the center, a young girl wearing a white and yellow patterned top and a light-colored skirt stands prominently. To her right, a boy in a blue sweater sits at a desk. Across the sequence, students shift slightly in their positions; one student in the background raises a hand, and others adjust their posture. On-screen text appears in the first two frames, stating, "My name is Patience, and I fled my country due to the lack of security." The scene remains consistent in location and composition throughout the clip, capturing a quiet moment of interaction within the educational setting.
